problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
mechanism: Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site
hypothesis: The key to Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease? is Small molecule inhibitor of enzyme active site — specifically Small molecule inhibitor — which would help 50,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
